---
title: ""
body-classes: "home"
---

# About me
<!-- # Mads Nørgaard -->  

```{=html}
<p class="eyebrow">PhD Candidate · Political Science · Aarhus University</p>
```

Welcome to my website! My name is Mads, and I am a PhD candidate in Political Science at Aarhus University. 
My research examines how citizens perceive and evaluate their political representatives -- with a particular focus on the social and professional backgrounds of politicians and what these mean for political support. 

In my PhD dissertation, I use survey experiments and quantitative text analysis to study how perceptions of political elites shape political trust, feelings of representation, and democratic satisfaction among ordinary citizens.
